text:
Created attachment 197978
Fix OpenSSL 1.1.x build

palm/jpilot: Fix OpenSSL build
 
 PR:             231931
 Submitted by:   Nathan <ndowens@yahoo.com>


After looking at the configure script, it also looks for gcrypt in order to enable openssl support. Adding libgcrypt.so fixed build for OpenSSL 1.1.x build 
This also fixes the japanese/jpilot build listed in PR:#231931
